pi_items.source: Task description explicitly states '(Initial Stock: 100)' for both Wagyu Patty and Brioche Bun. Verifier.py assumes 100 as baseline for deduction check (lines 72, 81)
Task description objective states 'leaving 99 of each item'. Verifier.py lines 72, 81 check for stock == 99.0. Math: 100 - 1 (one burger sold) = 99

privileged_info_summary: Floreant POS 1.4 build 1707b is a real, established open-source POS system (verified via SourceForge). This task uses entirely synthetic data: creates test inventory items 'Wagyu Patty' and 'Brioche Bun' with initial stock of 100 units each, creates test menu item 'Wagyu Burger' linked to these inventory items via recipe, processes one sale, and verifies inventory automatically deducts to 99 units per item. All metadata values (item names, stock levels) are task specifications that match the task description and verifier logic exactly.
